### 📌 Description
Initialize the base Maven project configuration, automation scripts, and CI/CD pipelines for the Playwright Hybrid Framework.

---

### 🧪 Key Changes & Features
- [ ] **Maven Project Initialization**
- [ ] Created `pom.xml` enforcing Java 17 minimum requirement (no dependencies yet).
- [ ] **CI/CD Pipeline Setup**
  - [ ] `main-ci.yml` (POM Validation, Build, Code Quality)
  - [ ] `feature-pr.yml` (Fast PR Checks)
  - [ ] `release-pr.yml` (Automated Release Trigger)
- [ ] **Automation Scripts Integration**
  - [ ] `pom-validator.sh` v2.0 with HTML reporting
  - [ ] `milestones.sh` for roadmap management
  - [ ] PR and Issue generation scripts
- [ ] `.gitignore` configured for Java/Maven projects.

**Basic directory structure:**
 - [ ] `/src/main/java/`
 - [ ] `/src/test/java/`
 - [ ] `/scripts/`
 - [ ] `/.github/workflows/`

🟢 **Output**: Clean Maven project scaffold with robust CI/CD and validation scripts.
